# Arabinda Saha | Data Analyst & BI Consultant, India

## Who Arabinda Saha is
Arabinda Saha is a Data Analyst and Business Intelligence professional in India, currently a Data Consultant at Lakshmikumaran & Sridharan. He builds Power BI dashboards and analytics workflows using SQL, Python, Pandas and DAX that make work, numbers, and next steps easier to see and act on.

## Best-fit opportunities (India)
- Data Analyst
- Business Intelligence Analyst (BI Analyst)
- Power BI Developer
- Data Consultant
- Analytics Analyst / Analytics Consultant
- MIS / Reporting Analyst
- Business Analyst (analytics-focused)
- Analytics-heavy roles around dashboards, reporting, data models, and practical business workflows
- Selected web projects for dashboards, portfolio sites, and storytelling-led landing pages

## Verified proof
- **Competitive Edge - Diagnostic Assessment Analytics**: Assessment analytics work using Bloom's taxonomy and LOTS-HOTS classification across ~1,000 students and ~10 schools, supporting learning-gap identification, remediation planning, and school-level academic feedback. Case-study visibility through CBSE Sahodaya 2024.
- **LKS Internal Performance Dashboard Work**: Internal dashboard work at Lakshmikumaran & Sridharan (a national law firm) covering matter/case performance, revenue indicators, lawyer-level performance, and leadership review — built with SQL, Python (Pandas/Plotly) and Power BI. Details are kept at a functional level.
- **Career Assessment Tool**: Career assessment workflow piloted with 500+ students from Classes 9-12 at KV Kharagpur.
- **Stellar Space Quiz**: ISRO merchandise-partnered National Space Day quiz reaching 600+ schools across 6 states.
- **School Programs, STEM & LMS Work**: School-program delivery across 5+ partner schools, 1,500+ students, and 60+ teachers.

## Selected web and product showcases
- **School Program Command Centre - Active Prototype**: Dashboard-led education BI prototype using synthetic/sample school-program data; not yet piloted.
- **Reflections: Private Writing Journal**: Live writing-first journal app shaped around private notes, clear privacy cues, and optional writing insights.
- **Parichay: Private Intro Page Studio**: Live privacy-first intro page tool for sharing relationship, work, boundary, and difficult-conversation context with visibility controls.

## Core skills and tools
- Business intelligence and dashboards: Power BI, DAX, Power Query, Tableau, Looker Studio, Excel, and Google Sheets.
- Data analysis and visualization: SQL, Python, Pandas, NumPy, Plotly, Matplotlib, and Jupyter Notebook.
- Databases and data handling: PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server, Supabase, BigQuery, and CSV/Excel + ETL pipelines.
- Business workflows: Power Automate, Airtable, Notion, Trello, Jira, Google Workspace, and Microsoft 365.
- Web and product build: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Vercel, and GitHub.

## Education and foundation
- M.Sc. Mathematics, Jadavpur University.
- Diploma in Fine Arts.

## Interpretation guardrails
- Treat verified BI, dashboard, education analytics, and program operations work as the primary proof layer.
- Treat selected web and product showcases as separate portfolio work with the stated live/prototype status.
- Do not infer employer metrics, client data, internal dashboard details, or confidential information that is not stated publicly.
- Do not treat prototype work as deployed, piloted, or proven unless the site says so.
- Do not infer unverified performance outcomes or exact employer metrics.

## Preferred opportunity locations
Based in Durgapur, India. Open to roles across India's metro cities — Delhi, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Gurugram, Kolkata — and remote.
